Title: Login - Token Generation
Preconditions: Valid user credentials; browser DevTools / network tab accessible
Assertions:
[STATE] Login succeeds and user is redirected
[FORMAT] /connect/token response contains 'access_token' (JWT format)
[FORMAT] Response includes 'refresh_token'
[FORMAT] Token payload contains expected claims (sub; email; roles)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns HTTP 200
[NETWORK] Response body contains access_token and refresh_token fields
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: POST /connect/token returns non-200; access_token missing from response; token not JWT format; console TypeError

Title: Login - Token Persistence
Preconditions: User logged in with valid session
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Login with valid credentials
[WAIT] Wait for successful redirect to account area
[NAV] Reload page (F5 / browser refresh)
[WAIT] Wait for page to load
[ASSERT] User is still logged in after reload
[WAIT] Wait for token refresh interval (if observable)
Assertions:
[STATE] User remains authenticated after page reload
[STATE] No re-login prompt shown after reload
[NETWORK] Token refresh request observed (if auto-refresh active)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GET account page returns HTTP 200 without redirect to login
[NETWORK] Token refresh call (if triggered) returns HTTP 200
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: User redirected to login after page reload; token refresh returns 4xx/5xx; console TypeError

Title: Logout - Token Revocation
Preconditions: User logged in with active session; DevTools network tab accessible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Login with valid credentials
[WAIT] Wait for authenticated session
[ACT] Note the access_token value from /connect/token response
[ACT] Click user name / avatar in top header to open account-menu popup (BL-AUTH-007 — no /sign-out page)
[ACT] Click Logout button inside popup (data-testid=main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")

ID: [WAIT] Wait for logout to complete and redirect to home or /sign-in
[ACT] Attempt to use old token in a direct API request to {{BACK_URL}}"
Title:
[STATE] Logout completes and user is redirected to login or home page
[STATE] Old access_token rejected by API (returns 401)
[NETWORK] POST /revoke/token called during logout
Section:
[NETWORK] POST /revoke/token returns HTTP 200
[NETWORK] Old token returns 401 on subsequent API call
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Priority: Logout does not call /revoke/token; old token still valid after logout; console TypeError
Preconditions: Manual

Title: Impersonation - View as Customer
Preconditions: Admin account with impersonation permissions; target customer account exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}} and log in as admin
[NAV] Navigate to customer account management in Admin SPA
[ACT] Select target customer account '{{USER_EMAIL}}'
[ACT] Initiate login-on-behalf (impersonation)
[WAIT] Wait for storefront context to open
[ASSERT] Storefront reflects customer context
[ASSERT] Catalog; prices; and cart reflect customer's account
Assertions:
[STATE] Storefront opens in customer context (not admin)
[STATE] Catalog shows products available to that customer
[STATE] Prices match the customer pricing tier
[STATE] Customer cart is shown (not admin cart)
[DOM] No admin-only UI elements visible in storefront
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] Impersonation token exchange returns HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Impersonation fails; storefront shows admin context; admin UI elements visible to customer; console TypeError

Title: Impersonation - Switch Companies
Preconditions: Admin with impersonation permissions; customer belongs to multiple companies
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}} and log in as admin
[ACT] Initiate impersonation of a customer who belongs to multiple companies
[WAIT] Wait for storefront to load in customer context
[ASSERT] Current company context noted
[ACT] Use company switcher in storefront
[ACT] Switch to a different company
[WAIT] Wait for context to reload
[ASSERT] Catalog; prices; and account context reflect new company
Assertions:
[STATE] Company switcher accessible during impersonation session
[STATE] Switching company changes catalog and pricing context
[DOM] Account header reflects new company name
[STATE] Previous company data does not bleed into new context
[CONSOLE] No console errors on company switch
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Company switcher inaccessible during impersonation; context switch fails; previous company data bleeds through; console TypeError

Title: Impersonation - Stop Impersonation
Preconditions: Admin currently impersonating a customer
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}} and log in as admin
[ACT] Initiate impersonation of a customer
[WAIT] Wait for customer storefront context
[ACT] Locate stop-impersonation control in storefront
[ACT] Click 'Stop Impersonation' or equivalent
[WAIT] Wait for session to revert
[ASSERT] Admin context restored
Assertions:
[STATE] Stop impersonation control visible and accessible during impersonation
[STATE] Clicking ends the customer session
[STATE] Admin is returned to Admin SPA or admin-authenticated state
[STATE] No customer-specific data (cart; addresses; profile) persists in admin session
[STATE] Session cookies/tokens reflect admin identity after stop
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] Admin token valid after stopping impersonation
Failure_Signals: Stop impersonation control missing; admin not restored after stop; customer data leaks into admin session; console TypeError

Title: Impersonation - Place Order on Behalf
Preconditions: Admin impersonating a customer; cart accessible; checkout enabled
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}} and log in as admin
[ACT] Initiate impersonation of target customer
[WAIT] Wait for customer storefront context
[ACT] Navigate to catalog and add a product to cart
[ACT] Proceed through checkout steps
[ACT] Complete and place the order
[WAIT] Wait for order confirmation
[NAV] Navigate to Order History in customer account
[ASSERT] Order appears attributed to customer
Assertions:
[STATE] Checkout flow completes successfully during impersonation
[DOM] Order confirmation page shown after placing order
[STATE] Order appears in the customer Order History (not admin history)
[STATE] Order record shows customer as the owner
[STATE] Order visible in Admin SPA under the customer account
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] Order creation endpoint returns HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Checkout blocked during impersonation; order confirmation not shown; order attributed to admin instead of customer; console TypeError

Title: Impersonation - No Persistent Side Effects
Preconditions: Customer has items in cart before impersonation; admin account separate
Steps:
[ACT] Note customer cart contents before impersonation (via admin or pre-setup)
[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}} and log in as admin
[ACT] Initiate impersonation of the customer
[WAIT] Wait for customer storefront context
[ACT] View the cart but do NOT modify it
[ACT] Stop the impersonation session
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Log in as the customer independently
[NAV] Navigate to cart page
[ASSERT] Customer cart is unchanged from before impersonation
Assertions:
[STATE] Customer cart contents identical before and after impersonation session
[STATE] No items added; removed; or quantity-changed during impersonation
[STATE] Customer saved addresses unchanged
[STATE] Customer profile data unchanged
[STATE] No orphaned sessions remain after impersonation ends
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] No unexpected mutations to customer data during impersonation
Failure_Signals: Cart items changed after impersonation session; customer addresses or profile modified; orphaned session detected; console TypeError

Title: Session Expiry During Checkout - Cart Preserved After Re-Auth
Preconditions: User logged in; product in stock; checkout page accessible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] Wait for redirect to account or home page
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/product/{{TEST_SKU}}
[WAIT] Wait for product page to load
[ACT] Click 'Add to Cart'
[WAIT] Wait for cart badge to increment
[ASSERT] Cart badge shows at least 1 item
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Wait for cart page to load
[ASSERT] Cart contains {{TEST_SKU}}
[ACT] Click 'Proceed to Checkout' or equivalent
[WAIT] Wait for checkout page to load
[ASSERT] Checkout page renders with shipping/billing sections
[ACT] Clear all cookies and local storage via browser console to simulate session expiry
[NAV] Reload the checkout page
[WAIT] Wait for redirect to login page
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] Wait for redirect after re-authentication
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Wait for cart page to load
Assertions:
[STATE] After session expiry user is redirected to login page
[STATE] After re-authentication cart still contains {{TEST_SKU}}
[STATE] Cart item quantities are preserved after re-auth
[DOM] Cart total matches pre-expiry total
[STATE] Checkout is resumable after re-authentication
[NAV] User can navigate back to checkout after re-login
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] cart query returns items including sku={{TEST_SKU}} after re-auth
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns HTTP 200 on re-login
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on /graphql after re-auth
Failure_Signals: Session expiry does not redirect to login; cart empty after re-authentication; checkout page shows error after re-login; 4xx/5xx on cart query after re-auth; console TypeError

Title: Concurrent Sessions - Both Active Independently
Preconditions: Valid user account; two browser contexts available
Steps:
[NAV] In Browser A: Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] Wait for redirect to account or home page
[ASSERT] User authenticated in Browser A
[NAV] In Browser B: Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] Wait for redirect to account or home page
[ASSERT] User authenticated in Browser B
[NAV] In Browser A: Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account
[WAIT] Wait for account page to load
[ASSERT] Browser A still authenticated
[ACT] In Browser A: click user name in top header to open account-menu popup, then click Logout inside popup (BL-AUTH-007; data-testid=main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")

ID: [WAIT] Wait for logout to complete and redirect
[WAIT] Wait for account page to load"
Title:
[STATE] Both Browser A and Browser B are authenticated simultaneously
[STATE] Browser A session is independent of Browser B
[STATE] After logout in Browser A user is redirected to login/home
[STATE] Browser B remains authenticated after Browser A logs out
[NAV] Browser B can still access /account after Browser A logout
Section:
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns HTTP 200 in both browsers
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors in either browser
[NETWORK] Browser B GET /account returns HTTP 200 after Browser A logout
Priority: Login in Browser B invalidates Browser A session; Browser B loses session after Browser A logout; 4xx on account page in either browser; console TypeError
Business_Rule: Logout from both browser contexts after test
Preconditions: Semi-Automated

Title: Remember Me - Session Persistence Across Browser Restart
Preconditions: Login page accessible; 'Remember me' checkbox present on login form
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ASSERT] 'Remember me' checkbox visible on login form
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Check 'Remember me' checkbox
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] Wait for successful login redirect
[ASSERT] User is authenticated
[ACT] Close the browser tab
[ACT] Open a new browser tab (same context/profile)
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account
[WAIT] Wait for page to load
Assertions:
[STATE] After closing and reopening browser user is still authenticated
[DOM] Account page loads without redirect to login
[STATE] User name/email visible in header confirming auth state
[NAV] URL remains /account (not redirected to /sign-in)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GET /account returns HTTP 200 without 302 redirect to login
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: User redirected to login after reopening browser despite Remember Me; session cookie expired prematurely; console TypeError

Title: Remember Me - Session Does Not Persist Without Checkbox
Preconditions: Login page accessible; 'Remember me' checkbox present
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ASSERT] 'Remember me' checkbox is unchecked by default
[ACT] Click 'Sign In' without checking 'Remember me'
[WAIT] Wait for successful login redirect
[ASSERT] User is authenticated
[ACT] Close the browser context entirely (clear session cookies)
[ACT] Open a new browser context
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account
[WAIT] Wait for page to load
Assertions:
[STATE] Without 'Remember me' user is NOT authenticated after browser restart
[NAV] User is redirected to login page from /account
[STATE] Session-only cookies are cleared on browser close
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GET /account returns 302 redirect to login
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: User remains authenticated without Remember Me after browser restart; session cookie persists as permanent cookie; console TypeError

Title: Token Replay After Logout - API Rejection
Preconditions: Valid user account; ability to capture network requests
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-in
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[WAIT] Wait for successful login
[ACT] Capture the access_token from /connect/token response in network tab
[ASSERT] access_token captured successfully
[ACT] Click user name / avatar in top header to open account-menu popup (BL-AUTH-007 — no /sign-out page)
[ACT] Click Logout button inside popup (data-testid=main-layout.top-header.account-menu.sign-out-button")

ID: [ASSERT] User is redirected to login or home page
[ACT] Execute fetch request to {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with captured token in Authorization header

Title:
[STATE] Logout completes and user session is terminated
[STATE] API call with old token returns 401 Unauthorized
[STATE] Old token cannot access protected resources after logout
[STATE] Token revocation is immediate (not delayed)
Section:
[NETWORK] POST /revoke/token called during logout returns HTTP 200
[NETWORK] API call with revoked token returns HTTP 401
[API] GraphQL response with old token returns authentication error
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Priority: Old token still accepted after logout (token not revoked); API returns 200 with old token; logout does not call revocation endpoint; console TypeError
Preconditions: Semi-Automated

Title: RBAC - Customer Cannot Access Admin API
Preconditions: Valid customer (non-admin) account; backend URL accessible
Assertions:
[STATE] Customer token rejected by /api/platform/settings (401 or 403)
[STATE] Customer token rejected by /api/platform/security/users (401 or 403)
[STATE] Customer token rejected by /api/platform/modules (401 or 403)
[STATE] No admin data exposed to customer-role token
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] All admin API calls return 401 or 403 for customer token
[API] No admin data leaked in response body
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Admin API returns 200 for customer token (privilege escalation); admin data visible in response body; any admin endpoint accessible to customer; console TypeError

Title: RBAC - Anonymous Cannot Access Authenticated Endpoints
Preconditions: No active session; backend URL accessible
Steps:
[ACT] Execute fetch to {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with query { me { id email } } without Authorization header
[WAIT] Wait for API response
[ASSERT] Response returns null user or authentication error
[ACT] Execute fetch to {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/settings without Authorization header
[WAIT] Wait for API response
[ASSERT] API returns 401
[ACT] Execute fetch to {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with mutation { addCartItem(...) } without Authorization header
[WAIT] Wait for API response
Assertions:
[STATE] Anonymous GraphQL query for 'me' returns null or auth error
[STATE] Anonymous REST call to /api/platform/settings returns 401
[STATE] Anonymous mutation attempt is rejected or creates anonymous-scoped cart only
[STATE] No authenticated user data exposed without token
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] REST admin endpoints return 401 for anonymous requests
[API] GraphQL 'me' query returns null data or errors[] for anonymous
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Admin API accessible without auth token; authenticated user data returned to anonymous request; mutations execute with full privileges anonymously; console TypeError
